typography.hierarchy_rules: Tight tracking on headings (tracking-tight), uppercase + wide tracking for labels/overlines. Hierarchy gap must be respected.

layout.spacing_scale: Dense spacing (gap-4, p-4) to maximize data density.
layout.border_radius: Rounded-sm (4px) or Sharp edges (0px) to maintain the technical, Swiss brutalist aesthetic.

surfaces.description: Container layouts should use border-collapse style. Grid items should have border-r and border-b with border-border/40. No heavy dropshadows, rely on 1px borders for definition.

components.charts: Integrate TradingView widget (e.g., via iframe or react-ts-tradingview-widgets) for the main chart. Use Shadcn charts (Recharts) for the indicator panels (Volume, GAMMA, etc).
components.tables: Left-aligned text, right-aligned numbers, use monospace fonts for financial figures.
components.widgets: Ranking and Confluence scores should be highly visible, using large typography and accent colors (green/red) to guide the trader's action.
components.buttons: Flat design, clear focus states, use accent colors only for critical actions (Buy/Sell).

icons.style: Bold or Duotone, installed via yarn add @phosphor-icons/react

interactions_and_motion.focus: Focus rings required for all inputs/buttons.

specific_instructions_for_agent: Layout structure: Sidebar for assets (MNQ, MES, MYM, M2K) and timeframe selection (4H, 1H, 5M). Main area: TradingView chart widget. Right/Bottom area: Indicator panels.
The Confluence (First Filter) and Confidence (Confirmation) scores should have a dedicated prominent widget, perhaps a progress ring or bold metric.
Data table or lists for predictive (RSI, MACD) and confirmatory (Volume, GAMMA/Vix) indicators, using monospace fonts.
Include an alerts/signals section for 5M entry pullbacks.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='asset-selector-mnq').
Do not use card components with soft shadows; stick to the flat, technical grid borders.
